case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MILDRED MARISELA VEGA MIS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA MIS, MILDRED MARISELA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MILDRED MARISELA VEGA MIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA MIS, MILDRED MARISELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MILDRED MARISELA VEGA MIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO SEP-27-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MILDRED MARISELA VEEGA MIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGA MIS, MILDRED MARISELA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
